summary: Iteration 2 — validated media library CRUD, private company_info security, hardcoded 2025 copyright, admin flows, full checkout to Stripe, and responsive. 16/16 backend tests pass (1 skipped previously — checkout fixture — validated via UI). All frontend critical flows pass.

issues: React warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent}. Add DialogDescription for accessibility.

action_items: Optional: add DialogDescription (a11y) to Radix DialogContent usages to silence the missing-description warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Media upload endpoint validates extension by file suffix only (not MIME) — fine for admin-only route but could be tightened to also check content-type.
server.py is 741 lines — nearing size threshold; consider splitting into routers (auth, products, media, admin) for maintainability.
seed_data_creation: Media library test uploads created and then deleted by test suite; one PNG uploaded via frontend flow remains ('test.png') for visual reference.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_nova_milan.py. Correct checkout form testids: checkout-full_name, checkout-email, checkout-line1, checkout-line2, checkout-city, checkout-postal_code, checkout-country, checkout-phone (no split first/last). Promo validation is POST /api/promo/validate?code=NOVA10. Language default appears to be EN in this environment; hero already shows English before switching.

verified.full_checkout_flow_to_stripe: https://checkout.stripe.com/... reached with €890 Jelly Jaune Citron
